zh.lifeSummary: 當John Waller於從1365年1月9日到1366年1月8日出生在英國英格蘭肯特斯培爾度爾斯特時，他的父親Thomas Waller32歲，母親Christina de Chalfunte33歲。他於1385年與Margaret Lansdall結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於從1420年1月10日到1421年1月9日在英國英格蘭肯特斯培爾度爾斯特，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Waller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English waler, waliere, walour, waller ‘builder of walls, mason’.
English: in Sussex, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent wall.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English waller, a derivative of Middle English walle, Old English wælle, wælle. It is a West Midlands dialect form of Weller .

variants.name: Weller
meanings: English (Surrey, Sussex, and Kent): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English weller, willer, an agent derivative of Middle English welle (in southern England) and wille (in south western England), from Old English wella, well(e), wiella, wielle, willa, wyll(a), wylle. This type of name, a topographic term + -er, is particularly typical of Sussex and its neigbouring counties.
English: occupational name for someone who casts metal or who boils salt, from Middle English weller, willer, a derivative with -er of Old English wellan, wiellan ‘to boil’. Compare 5 below.
North German: variant of   Welle  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Waller was born from 9 January 1365 to 8 January 1366, in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Waller, was 32 and his mother, Christina de Chalfunte, was 33. He married Margaret Lansdall in 1385. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died from 10 January 1420 to 9 January 1421, in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Waller est né du 9 janvier 1365 au 8 janvier 1366, à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Waller, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Christina de Chalfunte, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lansdall en 1385. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé du 10 janvier 1420 au 9 janvier 1421, à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Waller von 9. Januar 1365 bis 8. Januar 1366 in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Waller 32 und seine Mutter Christina de Chalfunte 33. Er hat 1385 Margaret Lansdall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb von 10. Januar 1420 bis 9. Januar 1421 in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wallerがから1365年1月9日まで1366年1月8日にイギリスイギリスケントスペルドハルストで生まれた時，父Thomas Wallerは32歳，母Christina de Chalfunteは33歳であった。1385年にMargaret Lansdallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はから1420年1月10日まで1421年1月9日にイギリスイギリスケントスペルドハルストで死去し，イギリスイギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Waller(이)가 1365년 1월 9일부터 1366년 1월 8일까지 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스펠드후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Waller(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina de Chalfunte(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1385년 Margaret Lansdall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 1월 10일부터 1421년 1월 9일까지 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스펠드후르스트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Lansdall em 1385. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Waller родился с 9 января 1365 по 8 января 1366 в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Waller было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Christina de Chalfunte, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lansdall в 1385 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер с 10 января 1420 по 9 января 1421 в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
